case_title: VASQUEZ, JOSE vs. RACINE, EDWARD A. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B. MARKETING GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP OF LOURDES S. BORREGO & EDWARD A. RACINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B. MARKETING GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP OF LOURDES S. BORREGO & EDWARD A. RACINE $3,666.15 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,746.15
